home_intro.who: My name is Leymonaide. I like computers.
home_intro.what: This is my website where I aggregate my projects and write about topics which interest me. You know, the usual.

privacy_policy.para1: This site uses cookies to store user preferences, and for no other reason. This site does not collect nor sell personally identifying information.
privacy_policy.para2: I am not responsible for cookies managed by third parties, including embedded web page frames or external web pages linked to on this website.
privacy_policy.para3: If you wish to delete any cookies made on this website, please consult the settings of your web browser for more information.
